channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: See Elon Musk at Nasdaq for market open as SpaceX goes public
item.description: SpaceX shares opened at $150 on Friday, June 12, and popped above its IPO price of $135 per share, making Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

item.title: Tesla stock slides as investors turn to Musk’s crown jewel SpaceX
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares fell about 2% on Friday as investor attention moved to the market debut of SpaceX.

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Nasdaq is the home for 'the trillion dollar companies'
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPCX) began trading on the Nasdaq after its IPO on Friday, June 12. Nasdaq (NDAQ) President Nelson Griggs sits down with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi and Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman to discuss the public debut, making SpaceX the second Elon Musk-run company...

item.title: Update: SpaceX Shares Surge in Nasdaq Debut
item.description: (Updates with recent stock movement in first and second paragraph.) Space Exploration Technologie

item.title: Stocks Rise as SpaceX Shares Begin Trading
item.description: U.S. stocks gained in midday trading after SpaceX shares began trading 11% higher than their IPO price.

item.title: SpaceX Raises Record $75 Billion in Historic IPO, Reaches $1.8 Trillion Valuation
item.description: SpaceX just rewrote the IPO record book. The company sold more than 555 million shares at $135 each, raising $75 billion and landing a valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion. According to CNBC’s Melissa Lee, that places SpaceX as the seventh most valuable U.S.

item.title: SpaceX Soars 30% in Record $75 Billion Debut as Elon Musk Becomes the World’s First Trillionaire
item.description: Shares of SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) are up 30% in midday trading Friday after the company completed the largest IPO in history. SPCX stock traded near $175, well above the $150 open and the $135 IPO price set Thursday night. This ranks among the most closely watched NASDAQ debuts in years.

item.title: Tesla vs BYD: The Better EV Stock To Buy In June
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) and BYD (OTC: BYDDF) sit on opposite sides of the global EV map. Tesla’s Q1 2026 report delivered a margin rebound and another lift in AI subscriptions. BYD, the Shenzhen volume leader, is being repositioned by Beijing’s anti-involution campaign aimed at consolidating EV winn...

item.title: Musk Is Officially the World’s First Trillionaire
item.description: SpaceX shares surged after the company's Nasdaq debut Friday, giving the company a market capitalization of more than $2 trillion. That values Musk's stake at roughly $1.1 trillion. Combined with his Tesla position and other assets, Musk is worth about $1.

item.title: Elon Musk becomes world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX mega float
item.description: His fortune has been boosted by the sky-high valuation of his rocket and artificial intelligence firm SpaceX on its stock market debut.

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX soars to two trillion dollars in record-breaking IPO
item.description: It makes Tesla and X owner Mr Musk – already a billionaire – the world’s first paper trillionaire.

item.title: Musk’s Space X Goes Public: What Makes This IPO Different
item.description: WSJ’s Becky Peterson reports from the Nasdaq where Elon Musk’s SpaceX launches the largest IPO in history.

item.title: SpaceX Jumps 21% as Blockbuster Debut Pushes Market Valuation Above $2 Trillion
item.description: Shares of Space Exploration Technologies (SPCX) were rallying 21% on Friday as Elon Musk's rocket an

item.title: SpaceX, Tesla, EchoStar, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: The market’s narrative on Friday was pretty simple: the debut of Elon Musk’s rocket and artificial-intelligence company SpaceX. SpaceX debut impacted other space stocks during the trading session. Investors see the satellite maker as a proxy for SpaceX because it reached a deal last year to sell ...

item.title: Wall Street climbs as SpaceX shares launch, oil slides on Mideast deal hopes
item.description: Wall Street pushed higher on Friday as SpaceX shares began trading following world's largest initial public offering, while oil prices slid on hopes of an agreement to end the Middle East war.US President Donald Trump said on Thursday an agreement to end the Middle East war could be signed in day...

item.title: SpaceX Surges 19% in Nasdaq Debut
item.description: Shares of Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPCX) rallied 19% on Friday as the rocket and satellite company debute

item.title: SpaceX stock opens above IPO price in record debut
item.description: Elon Musk's rocket and satellite company raised $75 billion in the largest IPO ever, valuing SpaceX at $1.77 trillion

item.title: Elon Musk becomes world’s first trillionaire
item.description: Elon Musk has become the first trillionaire in history after his SpaceX business floated on the stock market in New York.

item.title: Tesla May Not Exist In 5 Years (Rating Upgrade)
Xiaomi delivers on Tesla’s decade-old robot charger vision with new home robotic arm
item.description: Xiaomi has unveiled a home robotic arm charger that autonomously plugs and unplugs your EV — delivering on a concept that Tesla prototyped over a decade ago but never brought to market. The compact device, only 152 mm wide, is designed to fit in tight home garage parking spaces and integrates int...

item.title: Is Tesla Stock More Valuable Than SpaceX?
item.description: SpaceX trading is set to begin, officially making Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk a trillionaire. SpaceX is worth more to Musk than Tesla, but which company will turn out more valuable to investors is harder to say. Tesla stock was up 0.2% in premarket trading at $399.86 Friday, while and fut...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock And Robotaxi Progress Put Lofty Valuation In The Spotlight
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is back in focus after a packed week that combined an unsupervised robotaxi rollout in Austin, fresh Full Self-Driving approvals in Belgium and Denmark, and a high profile upgrade from JPMorgan. See our latest analysis for Tesla. At a share price of US$399.15, Tesla has swung between...

item.title: Hedge funds sold broader tech ahead of SpaceX IPO, JPMorgan data shows
item.description: Hedge funds sold out of the biggest U.S. tech stocks, and some even added ‌bearish positions, according to data from a JPMorgan note late ‌Thursday, just before SpaceX was set to go public on Friday. Shares in the "Magnificent Seven" -- ​a group that includes some of the biggest tech names on Wal...

item.title: What's at Stake for the Market
item.description: Venture capitalist Marc Andreessen famously said that software was eating the world. Now, AI is eating the stock market. SpaceX, by virtue of its February merger with xAI, is the first of the money-losing frontier artificial intelligence companies to go public, beating OpenAI and Anthropic, albei...

item.title: SpaceX Faces Crucial Market Debut Following Historic IPO Success
item.description: SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) is preparing to begin trading on Nasdaq on Friday after completing the largest initial public offering ever, with investors committing $75 billion in a vote of confidence that Elon Musk’s long-term ambitions in space exploration, communications and artificial intelligence can...

item.title: SpaceX raises £56bn ahead of biggest ever IPO
item.description: The float could make Tesla and X owner Elon Musk the world’s first paper trillionaire.

item.title: How Musk's tactics left investors clamoring for SpaceX stock and ignoring risks
item.description: In recent years, Elon Musk has been picky about whom he allowed to buy in to SpaceX, the rocket ship company making its highly anticipated stock market debut this week. One investor said that when SpaceX was privately held, he used a connection with a cousin of the billionaire entrepreneur to buy...

item.title: SpaceX IPO: The Great Fleecing of Retail Investors Just Took Another Dark Turn
item.description: Just what retail investors needed... a leveraged SpaceX ETF debuting the same day as Wall Street's largest-ever IPO.

item.title: SpaceX guide: Everything you need to know about the biggest IPO in history
item.description: Investing.com -- SpaceX begins trading on Nasdaq today under the ticker SPCX, targeting a valuation of approximately $1.75 trillion and seeking to raise $75 billion, more than 2.5 times the previous record set by Saudi Aramco (TADAWUL:2222) in 2019. The scale alone rewrites the record books. But ...

item.title: SpaceX Shares Indicated More Than 35% Higher on Gray Markets
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Pre-IPO trading in derivatives linked to SpaceX indicates a gain of anything between 30% and 50% for Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company as retail investors flock to the much anticipated listing.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX IPO Raises $75 Billion in Biggest Debut of All ...

item.title: South Korean import sales rise 6% in May
item.description: The segment continues to be driven by strong demand for BEVs, led by Tesla and BYD.

item.title: SpaceX (SPCX) IPO is live today at $135: Here’s exactly what you need to know
item.description: SpaceX officially priced its initial public offering at $135 per share, offering 555,555,555 shares of Class A common stock and raising $75 billion in what is the largest IPO in stock market history. Shares are set to begin trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on Friday, June 12, under the ...

item.title: SpaceX files for $75bn IPO at $135 per share
item.description: The offering would value the reusable rocket company at $1.77tn.

item.title: Billionaire Ron Baron Believes SpaceX Will Be Worth $30 Trillion By 2040. Here's Why I'm Skeptical
item.description: Baron is hugely positive about SpaceX, largely because of Elon Musk.

item.title: Oppenheimer Predicts Over 40% Upside For Elon Musk's SPCX Ahead Of Blockbuster IPO: 'We See It As The Only...'
item.description: Investment bank Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. (NYSE:OPY) has launched the first coverage of commercial space flight company SpaceX on Wall Street, predicting a near 41% upside for the Elon Musk-led company ahead of Friday’s IPO. Oppenheimer Sets $190 Price Target In a new investor note released on Th...

item.title: JPMorgan Echoes Why Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) is One of the Best Forever Stocks to Buy
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the best forever stocks to buy, according to analysts. On June 7, JPMorgan reiterated that Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA)’s ambitions around autonomous vehicles, humanoid robotics, and energy storage are underappreciated.

item.title: SpaceX IPO set for liftoff in record market debut
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX was set to begin trading on the Nasdaq exchange Friday with the biggest initial public offering in history expected to make the polarizing entrepreneur the world's first trillionaire.SpaceX is the first out of the gates among leading AI giants eyeing public markets, with OpenAI...

item.title: SpaceX Is Going Public. Here's What a $25,000 Investment Could Be Worth by 2030.
item.description: Here's what could happen if you make a big bet on the leading space company.

item.title: SpaceX's first employee remains on mission: "Space is super important"
item.description: Tom Mueller, Elon Musk's first hire at SpaceX, expects the company's IPO to help power a new era in space exploration.

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Dan Ives Sees Access To Elon Musk’s Broader Universe Expanding
item.description: SpaceX has locked in its IPO at $135 per share, raising $75 billion from the sale of 555.56 million shares and valuing the company at $1.77 trillion.

item.title: Tesla-SpaceX Merger Speculation Heats Up As Analysts Clash Ahead Of SpaceX IPO
item.description: Oppenheimer analysts argued that keeping the two companies separate would better support Elon Musk’s long-term artificial intelligence ambitions.

item.title: 3 Juggernaut IPOs: Did Investors Get Rich or Not?
item.description: Tracey looks at the big IPOs from Facebook, Tesla, and Alibaba. How'd investors do?

item.title: Should You Buy SpaceX on Its First Day of Trading?
item.description: This Elon Musk-led company has big ambitions.

item.title: SpaceX IPO makes Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire
item.description: Few business leaders have been as deeply embedded in popular culture as Elon Musk, the ambitious entrepreneur who has become a central figure in internet culture and amassed a fortune that has made him the world's first trillionaire. At a time when concerns about inequality are high and public at...

item.title: SpaceX Tesla Merger Odds Are Rising
item.description: There is rarely a dull day for investors in Elon Musk's companies. Now that the SpaceX IPO is done (secondary market trading will start Friday), thoughts can turn back to the long-term plans Musk might have for his business empire. A merger with Tesla is on the table.

item.title: Here's How Much a $1,000 Investment Could Get You When SpaceX Goes Public June 12
item.description: SpaceX finally goes public on June 12 with a $1.77 trillion valuation and a $135 offer price -- but that's not the price you'll pay.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Rollout And FSD Expansion Test Rich Valuation Narrative
item.description: Tesla launched an unsupervised robotaxi service across the Austin metropolitan area, marking one of the first commercial scale driverless ride hailing deployments. The company gained additional European Union approvals for its supervised Full Self Driving software, including in Belgium and Denmar...

item.title: Elon Musk’s Extremely Confusing Comments On “Universal HIGH INCOME”
item.description: In an article a couple of days ago about AI and the government’s role in its ownership and profits, Steve Hanley shared that Elon Musk recently wrote the following: “Universal HIGH INCOME via checks issued by the Federal government is the best way to deal with unemployment caused by AI.” ... [c...

item.title: NIO Stock Climbs — Onvo Launches Refreshed L60 At Lower Price To Challenge Tesla Model Y
item.description: The new Onvo L60 starts at RMB 192,800, compared to Model Y’s starting price of RMB 263,500.

item.title: SpaceX to make historic IPO that could make Musk a trillionaire
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX on Thursday confirmed it will begin trading on the Nasdaq exchange Friday in the biggest initial public offering in history, a blockbuster market debut that could propel the entrepreneur to trillionaire status.A successful IPO could make him the first trillionaire in history on...
